name: 13q34_IRS2_telomeric_SD
description: IRS2 (insulin receptor substrate 2) at 13q34 lies inside a ~250 kb subtelomeric SD module shared at >95% identity with regions of 4q35 and 10q26. The block is flanked by AT-rich palindromes that act as fragile-site nuclei and mediate intragenic IRS2 rearrangements rarely reported in T2D-linked cohorts.

architecture.internal_structure: ~250 kb subtelomeric SD with directly-oriented 5-15 kb internal repeats and AT-rich palindromic flanks; shared with subtelomeric regions on 4q and 10q.
